title: pilosella corvigena
intro: Pilosella corvigena, also known as the Alpine Mouse-ear, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Pilosella corvigena include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pilosella corvigena can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
